nodes.title: Sync latest Python releases
Remove stale `uv-bench` platform tags input
Respect `--require-hashes` when installing from `pylock.toml` files
Bump version to 0.11.12
Upload JUnit summaries for our tests
Sync latest Python releases
Require git refs in URLs to be percent-encoded
Fix test filter to work with dot-dirs
Respect `--no-dev` over `UV_DEV=1`
Include data files in editable builds
Fix bug from inconsistent workflow name in GHA-PyPI guide example
Add `--no-editable` support to `uv pip install`
Bump version to 0.11.11
Continue docs/versions/mirror publish on crates.io failure
fix(cache): accept legacy ID format from pre-0.11.9 cache entries (#19298)
fix(lock): warning suggests non-existent --no-frozen flag (#19290)
Bump version to 0.11.10
Add job to prepare a release branch
Allow releases to continue on failure to publish to crates.io
Ensure that all Python downloads do not panic on `VersionRequest::from(PythonVersion)`
Increase the timeout for crates.io publishes
Allow pre-release Python requests with non-zero patch versions
Fix pre-release handling in the manual release script
Bump version to 0.11.9
Fix CI: update `python_upgrade` snapshot for `3.14.5rc1` pre-release, keep `LATEST_PYTHON_3_14` at stable `3.14.4`
Bump `LATEST_PYTHON_3_14` to `3.14.5rc1`
Fix transitive Git path dependencies in lockfiles
Sync latest Python releases
Omit compatible release desugaring for pre-release hints
Bump rand to 0.9.4
Update uraimo/run-on-arch-action action to v3.1.0
Update Rust crate data-encoding to v2.11.0
Update CodSpeedHQ/action action to v4.14.0
Update Rust crate webpki to v0.103.13
Update Rust crate tracing-durations-export to v0.3.3
Update Rust crate rkyv to v0.8.16
Update Rust crate jiff to v0.2.24
Update dependency astral-sh/uv to v0.11.8
Update debian Docker tag to trixie-20260421
Detect TOML 1.1 and automatically enable the toml backwards compatibility preview feature
Update Rust crate test-log to v0.2.20
Fix URL prefix matching to require path boundaries
Prevent uninstalling site-packages for empty `top_level.txt` in `.egg-info`
